title: PROJECT_TEMPLATE
desc: Canonical scaffold for portfolio case studies. Copy this entry in projects.json, set listed to true, and replace every field with your project.
overview: This record documents the full project schema used by the site: list card fields, detail panels, metrics, highlights, and links. It is not shown on the public projects index.
challenge: Replace with the core constraint or problem your project addressed.
outcome: Replace with the measurable or qualitative result you delivered.
highlights: Bullet one — key technical or product outcome
Bullet two — architecture or process highlight
Bullet three — impact or reliability note
